description_long: This is a rectangular wooden cabinet with a two-tone finish, featuring a natural wood top and a painted gray body. The front side displays two open shelves on the left and two drawers with metal ring handles on the right, providing both open and closed storage options. The sides are plain with recessed panel detailing, while the back is solid wood with two circular cutouts, likely for cable management. The cabinet stands on short, sturdy legs with a slight inward taper, giving it a classic, slightly elevated look. The overall construction suggests it is designed for use as a media console or storage unit in urban interiors or garages. The materials and build indicate durability and functionality, suitable for supporting electronic devices or other household items.
description: A two-tone wooden cabinet with open shelves, drawers with metal handles, and a solid back with cable cutouts. It features a natural wood top, gray painted body, and classic panel detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open shelves on the left, two drawers with metal ring handles on the right, and a natural wood top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain gray painted panel and the thickness of the wood top.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a solid wood back with two circular cable cutouts and no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain panel and wood top.
